ingredients.item: ¼ cup (60 ml) fresh lemon juice
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (60 ml) fresh lemon juice

ingredients.item: 1/8 teaspoon black pepper, or more to taste
ingredients.original: 1/8 teaspoon black pepper, or more to taste

ingredients.item: 1 Add the tahini and crushed garlic to a medium bowl and whisk to combine.
ingredients.original: 1 Add the tahini and crushed garlic to a medium bowl and whisk to combine.

ingredients.item: 2 Slowly add the lemon juice and whisk; the mixture will start to seize up and look very dry.
ingredients.original: 2 Slowly add the lemon juice and whisk; the mixture will start to seize up and look very dry.

ingredients.item: 3 Gradually add about ¾ cup (180 ml) of water, 2 to 3 tablespoons at a time, while whisking until the mixture is smooth.
ingredients.original: 3 Gradually add about ¾ cup (180 ml) of water, 2 to 3 tablespoons at a time, while whisking until the mixture is smooth.

ingredients.item: 4 Season with the salt and pepper and garnish with the chopped parsley.
ingredients.original: 4 Season with the salt and pepper and garnish with the chopped parsley.
